macro: Atlas rolled back into a risk-off local regime: weak breadth, elevated volatility, and a live oil/rates overhang keep the burden of proof on the bulls.
policy: The March 17–18 FOMC window still caps aggressive risk-taking; without calmer oil and better breadth, any rebound should be treated as tactical rather than durable.
delta: Watchdog recovery published the 2026-03-13 digest, refreshed summary.json to today's report, and rebuilt the report archive after the primary morning publish was missing.
